CustomField.description: Set by coordinator when connected or similar actions under 40 CFR 1508.25(a) have been identified and scoped. Required by the Stage Gate VR-001 extension to advance EA/EIS to Draft EIS Publication. Addresses DG-002 (connected/cumulative actions not systematically scoped).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Connected and similar actions (40 CFR 1508.25) have been identified and scoped. Required before Draft EIS publication for EA/EIS processes.
CustomField.label: Connected Actions Identified
